meta.title: Clairo — Understand any contract. In any language. Instantly.
meta.description: Clairo explains what your contract says in plain language. Not legal advice — clear understanding.

trust.heading: Before we start
trust.subheading: Here's how Clairo handles your document

privacy.title: Processed in memory only
privacy.body: Your document is never saved to disk. It is deleted from memory the moment analysis is complete.

deletion.title: Deleted immediately
deletion.body: No copy of your document is ever stored in our database, logs, or cache. Ever.

explain.title: Explanation, not legal advice
explain.body: Clairo helps you understand your contract in plain language. It does not give legal advice. Always consult a lawyer for legal decisions.

trust.checkbox_label: I have read and agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
trust.links_hint: Links open in a new tab
trust.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
trust.legal_note: ⚠️ LEGAL DISCLAIMER: Clairo is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. Analysis is for informational purposes only.

upload.drag_or_tap: Drag a file here, or tap to select
upload.accepted_types: PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, HEIC · Max 25 MB
upload.options_label: Or choose another way to upload
upload.camera_label: Open camera to photograph a document
upload.gallery_label: Choose a photo from your gallery
upload.privacy_reminder: Your document is never stored. Analysed in memory and deleted immediately.

error.type: File type not supported. Please use PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, or HEIC.
error.size: File is too large. Maximum size is 25 MB.

disclaimer.heading: Not legal advice.
disclaimer.body: Clairo explains what your contract says in plain language. It does not give legal advice and cannot tell you whether to sign. For legal decisions, consult a qualified lawyer.

errors.404Message: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.500Message: We encountered an error. Your document was not stored.

issue.too_dark: Too dark — move to better lighting

error.permission_hint: Allow camera access in your browser settings to take photos.

review.heading: Review Your Document
review.subheading: Verify the text extracted from "{filename}" before analysis. Tap any word to correct it.
review.empty_page: No text detected on this page.

warning.low_words: {count} word(s) could not be read clearly — please verify.
warning.number_words: {count} number(s) or amount(s) detected — always verify these carefully.

review.confirm_label: I have reviewed and confirmed the text above is accurate before proceeding to analysis.
review.confirm_hint: You must confirm the text is correct before continuing.

language_mismatch.heading: Language mismatch detected
language_mismatch.body: We detected your document is in {detected}, but you selected {selected}. Which would you like to use?

language_selection.heading: Set language context
language_selection.subheading: Tell us about your document so we explain it in the right legal context.

country.label: Country
country.tooltip: Sets the legal context — contract norms vary significantly by country.

confidence.high: High confidence — this language and country pair is well supported
confidence.medium: Medium confidence — results may vary for this combination

language_selection.cta_hint: All three fields required to continue

processing.encouragement: Taking a little longer than usual — almost there
processing.privacy: Processed securely. Your document is deleted when analysis is complete.

cancel_dialog.heading: Cancel analysis?
cancel_dialog.body: Your document will be deleted immediately and the analysis will stop.

prohibited.heading: We can't analyse this document

reasons.court_order: Court orders, judgments, and legal proceedings require professional legal representation. Automated analysis of these documents could cause serious harm.
reasons.immigration: Immigration documents have life-changing legal consequences. Please seek help from a qualified immigration lawyer or authorised organisation.
reasons.medical_consent: Medical consent forms involve complex legal and ethical considerations that require professional medical and legal advice.
reasons.financial_instrument: Financial instruments such as securities, derivatives, and loan agreements require regulated financial advice.
reasons.minor_involved: Documents involving minors require specialist legal advice to protect the child's best interests.
reasons.default: This type of document requires specialist professional advice that Clairo cannot provide.

prohibited.referral_link_aria: Get help from {org} (opens in new tab)
prohibited.no_partial_analysis: No analysis has been performed and no quota has been used.

number_verification.heading: Verify this number
number_verification.source_aria: Original text from your document containing this number
number_verification.warning_body: OCR can mis-read numbers from scanned documents. Always check this number in your original document before relying on it.
number_verification.tap_aria: Tap to verify the number {value} against the original document

share.heading: Share this analysis
share.whatsapp_message: I used Clairo to understand my {type}. Check it out: {url}

professional.heading: Want a second opinion?
professional.body: Clairo explains your contract, but it isn't legal advice. A qualified professional can review your specific situation.

upgrade.message: Unlock unlimited clause analysis and saved documents.
